summary: Iteration 13: Verified Score Sheet upload, Summary columns (Total Naukri, Registered, Unregistered), and Role Drilldown score columns. All features working correctly. Rishi (Attended status) shows scores ZA=85, C++=78, Java=90, BA=88, Total Score=341. Non-attended candidates show '-' for all score columns.

backend: GET /api/role: returns 19 columns (7 base + 11 score + 1 Total Score)
Rishi (Attended status) shows scores: ZA=85, C++=78, Java=90, BA=88, Total Score=341
Non-attended candidates show '-' for all score columns
POST /api/upload/scoresheet endpoint exists and requires file
frontend: Dashboard shows Upload Score Sheet button with data-testid='upload-scoresheet-btn'
Dashboard shows score_sheet_count=9 in status bar
/summary page shows all 10 columns including Total Naukri and Total Unregistered
/roles/:jobRole drilldown table has 19 columns (7 base + 11 score + 1 Total Score)
Score columns only populated for Attended status (Rishi), all others show '-'
Score values displayed in cyan color for Attended candidates
Status badges display correctly: Attended (green), Not Attended (orange), Shortlisted (amber)

seed_data_creation: 9 score sheet records uploaded for Rishi (4 rounds: ZA, C++, Java, BA), Gautham (3 rounds), Madhumithaa (2 rounds). Only Rishi has Attended status (otp_verified=Yes), so only his scores are displayed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: Score Sheet upload endpoint (/api/upload/scoresheet), Summary page with 10 columns (including Total Naukri, Total Registered, Total Unregistered), Role Drilldown with 19 columns (7 base + 11 score + 1 Total Score). Score columns only show values for Attended status candidates. Rishi is the only Attended candidate with scores displayed. Job role contains special characters (& + /) which are properly URL-encoded.
